title: Common reasons why Telegram signal copiers fail on MT5
author: Carlosrabayfx
selftext:
After troubleshooting multiple copier setups, the most common problems I see are:

1. Incorrect symbol mapping      
2. Broker suffix mismatches      
3. VPS latency spikes      
4. Telegram parsing delays      
5. Risk settings configured improperly  

Many traders think the copier is broken when it’s actually a setup issue.

If anyone is facing execution problems, comment below and I’ll try to point you in the right direction.
